summary: Frontend testing of Loyalty Performance page at /owner/growth/loyalty. All 11 features tested successfully - KPI cards, Tier Distribution chart, Revenue by Tier bars, expandable Tier Detail Panel, guest navigation, and Growth Opportunity section all work correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1. This is a known Recharts issue when charts render before container has dimensions. Not blocking functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present and correctly named
Tier Distribution bar chart renders with 5 bars (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, VIP)
Revenue by Tier shows correct values ($24.0K, $32.0K, $28.0K, $22.0K, $18.0K)
Tier Detail Panel expands/collapses correctly with tier KPIs and guest list
Guest navigation works - clicking guest navigates to /owner/customers/{id}
Growth Opportunity section displays correct emphasis text (157% and 38% adoption)
Boost Loyalty Enrollment button visible and correctly styled
seed_data_creation: All data is mock/static from ownerData.js (ownerLoyaltyTiers and ownerGuests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loyalty Performance page fully tested. All features working: 4 KPI cards, Tier Distribution chart, Revenue by Tier horizontal bars, expandable Tier Detail Panel with guest list, guest navigation to customer profile, Growth Opportunity section with Boost Loyalty Enrollment CTA.

2_kpi_cards.details: 4 KPI cards display correct values: Adoption Rate 38%, Revenue from Loyal 68%, Loyal Avg Spend $185, Spend Lift +157%

3_tier_distribution_chart.details: Tier Distribution bar chart renders with 5 bars (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, VIP)

4_revenue_by_tier.details: Revenue by Tier shows 5 horizontal bars with correct values ($24.0K, $32.0K, $28.0K, $22.0K, $18.0K)

5_tier_click_expands_panel.details: Clicking Gold tier in Revenue by Tier section expands the Tier Detail Panel

6_tier_detail_panel_content.details: Tier Detail Panel shows tier name (Gold), count (68), revenue ($28K), KPIs (Total Revenue, Avg Spend, Members), and guest list (2 guests)

7_guest_navigation.details: Guest list items are clickable and navigate to /owner/customers/{id} (tested with og5)

8_close_button.details: Close button (X) on Tier Detail Panel closes it successfully

9_growth_opportunity_text.details: Growth Opportunity section shows correct text with emphasis on 157% and 38% adoption

10_boost_loyalty_cta.details: Boost Loyalty Enrollment button is visible with data-testid='boost-loyalty-cta'

11_data_testid_attributes.details: All required data-testid attributes present: loyalty-performance, loyalty-kpi-0 through loyalty-kpi-3, tier-distribution-chart, revenue-tier-bronze/silver/gold/platinum/vip, tier-detail-panel, tier-detail-close, tier-guest-*, boost-loyalty-cta
